methodsAttempted.notes: Found OEI guideline page, IIMC service page, IIMC security article, video page, and a hosted PDF.

methodsAttempted.notes: Confirmed the same public OEI/IIMC official sources.
Results were mostly research/profile/Q&A pages and did not produce a better public policy source.

methodsAttempted.query: site:kyoto-u.ac.jp AI 利用 授業 評価
methodsAttempted.notes: Found course/research pages, not university-wide AI policy sources.

methodsAttempted.query: site:kyoto-u.ac.jp 人工知能 研究倫理
methodsAttempted.notes: Results were research showcases or publications rather than actionable institutional AI guidance.
Found the English IIMC generative AI page and unrelated research/event pages.
Results were profile and publication pages; no official academic-integrity AI policy page found.
Confirmed the official IIMC English page and rejected third-party or other-institution results.
Identified the Kyoto University generative AI portal as login-limited and did not access it.

summary: Firecrawl search found three public official Kyoto University sources suitable for staged claims: OEI education/learning AI guideline, IIMC generative AI services page, and IIMC information-security article. Login-only, video-only, and non-Kyoto-specific sources were rejected.
